description_long: This vending machine features a rectangular, upright form with a predominantly dark metallic body and a deep red front panel. The front face displays several rows of visible products, including bottles and snack packages, behind a transparent window. A keypad and payment interface are located on the right side of the front, along with a small digital or illuminated display panel. The lower section includes a wide retrieval slot for dispensing purchased items. The sides and back are plain, solid, and unadorned, emphasizing the utilitarian design. The overall appearance is robust and suitable for placement in public urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or building lobbies.
description: A robust, dark metallic vending machine with a red front panel, visible product rows, keypad, and retrieval slot. Designed for public urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing product display window, keypad, payment interface, display panel, and retrieval slot.
description_view_1: Left side view showing a plain, solid dark panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, featureless dark surface.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain, solid dark panel, mirroring the left side.
attribute_display_panel: A small rectangular display panel is located on the right side of the front face, above the keypad, with a dark screen and illuminated border.
attribute_payment_interface: A keypad and card reader are present on the right side of the front, with a slot for card insertion and a numeric keypad for PIN entry.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A numeric keypad with individual buttons is located on the right side of the front, arranged in a grid pattern for product selection.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, horizontal retrieval slot is located at the lower center of the front panel, with a recessed opening for item collection.
